description.ButterflyBow: Get forage +1 in salmonberry season, and an additional salmonberry when harvest bushes.
description.BucketHat: Gain a fishing bonus during the Trout Derby, slightly increasing the chance of finding Golden Tags.
description.PumpkinMask: Get forage +1 in blackberry season, and an additional blackberry when harvest bushes.
description.SquidHat: Gain a fishing bonus during the Squid Festival, slightly reducing the difficulty of catching Squid.
condition.SpottedHeadscarf: Current date is within the last 7 days of the season.
condition.PartyHatRed: Current location is Mine level 80 or deeper, or the Skull Cavern.
description.LogoCap: Gain extra Fishing and Luck bonus when fishing in the mineshaft.
condition.LogoCap: Current location is the mine, and the level is 20, 60, or 100.
modifier.LogoCap: Get double buff effects at level 60, or triple at level 100.
description.SpaceHelmet: Gain combat bonuses while in the Dangerous Mines or Skull Cavern. The more dangerous the mine, the higher the bonus.
condition.SpaceHelmet: Current location is the dangerous mine or skull cavern.
modifier.SpaceHelmet: Active buff effects will be multiplied by the current mine's difficulty level.
condition.Souwester: Current location is outdoors and the weather is rainy.
modifier.Souwester: Fishing level buff will increased to 3 if stormy.
condition.BlobfishMask: Current location is the Night Market fishing submarine.
condition.BridalVeil: Player's gender is female, and today is player's first wedding ceremony.
condition.TopHat: Player's gender is male, and today is player's first wedding ceremony.
action.WeddingHat: Get +1 friendship heart with your spouse.
action.GoodOlCap: Gain 20 gold at the start of each day.
action.Sombrero: Wake up on Sundays to gain gold equal to 0.5% of total earnings, with no cap.
condition.FlatToppedHat: Current date is the last Thursday of Fall.
action.FlatToppedHat: Wake up to receive 1 Cranberry Sauce, 1 Stuffing, and 1 Farmer's Lunch.
action.SantaHat: Wake up to receive 1 Mystery Box. If you have the Foraging Mastery, receive 1 Golden Mystery Box instead.
description.LivingHat: Slowly recover your health and energy.
action.LivingHat: Recover 1 health and 2 energy per second.
description.CatEars: This hat might occasionally make meowing sounds...
description.CowboyHat: Gain an extra speed bonus while riding a horse. This buff icon will not appear on the status bar.
description.RaccoonHat: One of your animal neighbors seems interested in this hat. Wear it to their shop to get a free item every day.
description.WeeklyShop: A shop owner seems interested in this hat. Wear it to their shop to get a free item every week.
description.MonthlyShop: A shop owner seems interested in this hat. Wear it to their shop to get a free item every season.
description.JesterHat: It's said that wearing this hat lets you buy discounted tickets at the movie theater?
description.FriendShipHat: It seems a marriageable villager likes this hat. Why not wear it and chat with them?
description.ArcaneHat: Deals ×1.5 damage to Ghosts and Mummies. It seems a marriageable villager likes this hat. Why not wear it and chat with them?
description.SwashbucklerHat: Deals ×1.5 damage to Magma Sprites and Magma Sparkers. It seems a marriageable villager likes this hat. Why not wear it and chat with them?
description.GoldenMask: Deals ×1.5 damage to Serpents and Iridium Bats.
description.MummyMask: Mummies no longer harm you. (Warning: Do not use this to tease those Mummies, or they might get very angry...)
description.GilsHat: Entering the Skull Cavern during the Desert Festival with this hat grants an additional 10 Calico Egg points. If you take it off, these points will be deducted.
description.BlueRibbon: Upon entering the Stardew Valley Fair, you will receive 998 Star Tokens.
description.PanHat: When near a shiny spot, interacting with it 'empty-handed' will transform the hat into a Pan and start panning. Once done, the Pan turns back into a hat and returns to your head.
description.TotemMask: Press the active effect hotkey while wearing this to warp home. Once per day.
description.DelicateBow: Press the active effect hotkey while wearing this to continuously regenerate health and energy for 30 seconds. Once per day.
description.CoolCap: Press the active effect hotkey while wearing this. If it's the first 3 days of the season, it will instantly water all crops at your current location.
description.WhiteTurban: When harvesting Sweet Gem Berries, 10% chance to get an extra one.
description.QiMask: When harvesting Qi Fruit, 10% chance to get an extra one.
description.JunimoHat: When harvesting crops, 20% chance to get an extra crop.
description.GnomesCap: Increases the chance of a Crop Fairy appearing at night by 1%. This chance can be stack in multiplayer.
description.OfficialCap: Fishing treasure chests have a higher chance of becoming Golden Treasure Chests.
description.EyePatch: Greatly increases the fishing bar size in the fishing mini-game and reduces fish difficulty by 25%.
description.BlueBonnet: When using a Hoe to till dirts, 1% of chance to find an Artifact Trove.
description.MushroomCap: Increases the chance of finding Mixed Seeds or Mixed Flower Seeds when destroying Weeds by 5%.
description.GarbageHat: Increases the chance of finding items in Garbage Cans by 10%.
description.GoldenHelmet: Increases the chance of getting a Golden Coconut when shaking Palm Trees on Ginger Island by 10%.
description.MysteryHat: Multiplies the chance of finding Mystery Boxes (or Golden Mystery Boxes) by 1.25.
description.RadioactiveGoggles: Significantly increases the spawn rate of Radioactive Ore.
description.PolkaBow: Gain an additional 10 friendship points when talking to villagers.
description.GovernorsHat: Doubles the friendship increase with villagers at the Luau.
description.GoblinMask: Yes, indeed, it can freak out your neighbors…
description.TruckerHat: Reduces the price of a ticket to the Desert to 1g.
description.BlueBow: Put it on your son to gain +30 friendship when petting him.
description.PinkBow: Put it on your daughter to gain +30 friendship when petting her.
description.HairBone: Put it on your pet dog to increase the chance of dropping a gift when petting by 10%.
description.FishingHat: Put it on your pet cat to increase the chance of dropping a gift when petting by 10%.
description.SmallCap: Put it on your horse to increase riding speed by +1.
description.Limit: This seems to be a limited edition hat...
